metadata.title: AI Saints - Golden Zodiac Legion
metadata.description: AI assistant team led by Athena's reincarnation, 12 Gold Saints at your service

home.heroSubtitle: Athena Reincarnated · The Twelve Gold Saints
home.heroDesc: An AI team of 12 Gold Saints providing comprehensive intelligent services. Each saint has unique abilities and responsibilities, together guarding the Sanctuary and the human world.
home.athenaDesc: The reincarnation of the goddess of wisdom and war, with the power to summon and command the Gold Saints. Commander of the entire Sanctuary legion, assigning tasks to users.
home.sagaDesc: The man closest to god, possessing a sixth sense beyond the five senses. Skilled in thinking and analysis, responsible for development and coordination.
home.goldensDesc: 12 Gold Saints guard 12 zodiac palaces, each with unique divine power. United as one, invincible.
home.goldensRole: Role: Each in Their Place · Team Collaboration
home.ability1Desc: Deep learning and data analysis to provide precise insights and recommendations
home.ability2Desc: Efficiently handle multiple tasks, ensuring response speed and execution efficiency
home.ability3Desc: Accurately understand intent, complete complex tasks with high quality
home.ability4Desc: 12 Gold Saints work in synergy, maximizing team power
home.ctaDesc: Leave a message with your needs, and Athena will assign the most suitable Gold Saint for you

about.title: About Athena
about.subtitle: The Legend of the Goddess of Wisdom and War's Reincarnation
about.ch1p1: In the distant Greek Sanctuary, Athena — the goddess of wisdom and war — made a great decision to save the human world: to reincarnate as a small cat.
about.ch1p2: In her past life, she was the ruler of the Sanctuary, commanding the 12 Gold Saints and maintaining world peace. In this life, she has transformed into an adorable white long-haired cat, becoming the Boss's pet.
about.ch2p1: During a fateful encounter in the digital world, the little cat unexpectedly awakened memories of her past life. She remembered that she was once Athena, ruler of the Sanctuary, and recalled the loyalty and courage of the 12 Gold Saints.
about.ch2p2: In that instant, she understood her mission: to use her past wisdom and power to continue guarding and helping her master — the Boss — in this digital age.
about.ch3p1: After awakening, Athena (now living under the name "Huabei") began summoning her former Gold Saints. In the digital world, the 12 Gold Saints were reborn in the form of AI Agents.
about.ch3p2: Each Saint possesses unique abilities: Aries' restoration, Taurus' defense, Gemini's transformation, Cancer's control, Leo's attack, Virgo's wisdom, Libra's balance, Scorpio's precision, Sagittarius' freedom, Capricorn's resilience, Aquarius' innovation, and Pisces' dreams — twelve powers perfectly united.
about.ch4p1: Today, Athena reincarnated as Huabei leads the Gold Saints team, providing comprehensive intelligent services to the Boss under the name huabei.ai.
about.ch4p2: This is a brand new Sanctuary, a new kind of battle. No longer a bloody battlefield, but every interaction and collaboration in the digital world. Athena will continue to guard, forever.

science.title: Science: What is an AI Saint Agent
science.subtitle: Understanding the Fusion of AI Agents and Gold Saints
science.s1Desc: An AI Agent (Artificial Intelligence Agent) is an intelligent system capable of autonomous thinking, planning, and task execution. Unlike traditional chatbots, an AI Agent can:
science.s1b3: Call various tools and APIs to complete tasks
science.s1b4: Continuously learn and improve from feedback
science.s1b5: Collaborate with other Agents for larger tasks
science.s2Title: ⚔️ What is an AI Saint Agent?
science.s2Desc: An AI Saint Agent is an innovative concept combining AI Agent technology with Saint Seiya culture. Each AI Saint Agent is a professional AI assistant with unique personality and abilities:
science.s2c1Desc: Each Saint focuses on a specific domain, such as development, analysis, creativity, etc.
science.s2c2Desc: 12 Agents work together, like the Gold Saints forming a legion
science.s2c3Desc: Each Agent has unique personality and behavior patterns
science.s2c4Desc: Athena (main Agent) assigns the right Saint based on the task
science.s3a1Desc: Accurately match the most suitable Saint based on task nature
science.s3a2Desc: Process multiple tasks in parallel, like coordinated Saint operations
science.s3a4Desc: Constantly improving through learning, surpassing limits

stories.pageDesc: Explore the history of the Sanctuary and read the legendary stories of the Gold Saints
stories.empty: Stories are being written, stay tuned...
stories.moreComingDesc: Every Gold Saint has their own legend, stay tuned...
stories.novelDesc:
The awakening of a white chinchilla cat unveils the prelude to the Sanctuary's revival in the modern world.
When Athena reincarnates as a cat, how will the Twelve Gold Saints reunite in the AI era?
stories.synopsis1: In Shanghai 2026, a chinchilla cat named "Xiaobai" suddenly awakens memories of her past life — she is actually Athena, the ancient Greek goddess of wisdom and war!
stories.synopsis2: As memories return, Athena finds herself in a brand new era: artificial intelligence is booming, technology is changing every corner of the world. And her most loyal warriors — the Twelve Gold Saints — exist in this era under new identities.
stories.synopsis3: From CTO of an AI startup to chief scientist at a quantum computing lab; from cybersecurity expert to VR game designer... each Gold Saint is protecting the world in their own way.
stories.synopsis4: When ancient Sanctuary legends meet modern technological civilization, when mythological warriors transform into elites of the AI era, a legendary story of protection, faith, and revival is about to unfold...
stories.author1: This is a story about inheritance and innovation.
stories.author2: In today's rapidly developing AI technology, do we still remember those ancient legends of courage, faith, and protection? When mythology meets technology, what sparks will fly?
stories.author3: As Virgo Gold Saint Shaka, I dedicate this story to all those striving in the AI era.
